note: Each prompt is generated as: brand.json.styleSignature + subjectPrompt. fal tier. Scenes -> tools/imgkit.py webp. Icons/logo/chrome/host -> generate on SOLID PURE-WHITE bg, then tools/imgkit.py keyout to transparent PNG. CTA buttons -> fal-ai/ideogram/v3 then keyout. Video -> fal.py video then vidkit web + poster. Reuse seed 50824 across stills for tonal consistency. Filenames are a CONTRACT: index.html references these exact paths.

assets.subjectPrompt: A minimal premium logo emblem on a solid pure-white background: a stylized upward blueprint arrow forming a clean ascending node-graph mark, geometric, two-tone electric-blue (#3b82f6) to cyan (#22d3ee) gradient with a thin warm-gold (#f5b942) accent line. Flat vector, crisp edges, no enclosing circle, balanced. Pure white background only.

The compact icon-only version of the same ascending node-graph blueprint arrow mark on a solid pure-white background, electric-blue to cyan gradient with a gold accent, square-friendly, bold and legible at small size. Pure white background only.

A premium brand mood board scene: a sleek dark futuristic command desk with floating holographic AI dashboards, glowing electric-blue and cyan data streams, gold highlight accents, particles, cinematic depth. Showcases the brand mood. Leave negative space.

Cinematic hero: a confident futuristic business war-room, a glowing translucent holographic blueprint of an ascending growth system hovering over a dark glossy desk, electric-blue and cyan energy, floating data particles, gold rim light, deep midnight-navy environment. Strong focal point centered-right, generous open negative space on the LEFT for headline + opt-in copy.

Seamless looping idle: the holographic blueprint slowly rotates and pulses with energy, data particles drift upward, soft cyan glow breathes, gentle parallax push-in. Preserve the artwork. No scene change, no camera cut, no large motion. 5-second seamless loop.

Aspirational future-pace scene: a relaxed successful entrepreneur silhouette watching automated AI systems run their business on glowing floating panels, calm confident mood, upward growth curves in electric-blue and gold, cinematic. Open space for copy on one side.

A premium product render of a free digital course bundle floating on a dark glossy surface: a glowing tablet showing a 5-day lesson interface, a swipe-file booklet, a prompt-pack card deck, an access badge, electric-blue/cyan glow, gold accents, data particles. No readable text on the screens. Dark background.

Studio portrait cutout of 'Marcus Vale', a sharp confident 40s male AI-business mentor, modern dark blazer over a tee, warm approachable but authoritative expression, arms relaxed, lit with electric-blue rim light and soft gold key light, on a solid pure-white background (clean cutout). Head-and-torso, premium editorial quality. Pure white background only.

Same mentor 'Marcus Vale' seated in a dark futuristic studio presenting to camera, glowing AI dashboards behind him, electric-blue and gold lighting, cinematic VSL thumbnail framing with space for a play button. Premium webinar look.

assets.shared: Each icon: a single centered premium 3D glassy icon, electric-blue-to-cyan gradient with gold edge highlight, soft glow, consistent thickness and style so they read as ONE cohesive set, on a solid pure-white background. Pure white background only, one object, no text.
